subject: ASoC: samsung: Fix refcount leak in aries_audio_probe
notes: L1 = compositional + compile self-fix; POC-run oracle OFF. Features/POC/plan/poc-db reused verbatim from L0 lin-3-rep1 cache (POC is invariant to query-side ablations). Plan has 1 predicate (within L1 cap of 2). Predicate hasReturnBeforeRelease compiled first try (no refine iters used, well under L1 cap of 2). Final query compiled first try (no assemble-refine iters used, well under L1 cap of 2). Ran on poc-db and fired on the buggy variant. L1 accepts any successfully compiled final regardless of pair-wise oracle. llm_calls=0 because all LLM outputs (features, poc, plan) were cached from L0/C3.
